name: revit_create_winder_stairs
description: Creates L-shaped or U-shaped winder stair runs from connected curve elements with configurable step counts and run geometry.

curve_element_ids.description: Two ids for L-winder or three for U-winder (walls or model lines)

winder_type.description: Winder layout derived from selection count when omitted

run_width.description: Stair run width in internal units

enable_dmu.description: Register WinderUpdater for dynamic model update on curve changes

draw_sketch.description: Whether to draw the winder sketch curves

notes: Replace LWinderOptions/UWinderOptions dialogs; WinderUtil derives control points from curve_element_ids.
